title: cymboglossum longifolium
intro: Cymboglossum longifolium, also known as the Long-leaved Cymboglossum or Indian Plantain, is a plant species in the family Zingiberaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cymboglossum longifolium include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cymboglossum longifolium can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or by using them in traditional remedies like decoctions and infusions.
